name: Cremona Inoxidable
message: www.creminox.com , https://www.zoominfo.com/c/cremona-inoxidable-sa/359162083 Cremona Inoxidable S.A. specializes in manufacturing equipment and systems for the food industry, particularly focusing on products for the processing lines of meat and sausages. Their offerings include multiple molding systems, automatic cooking and cooling systems, and demolding systems designed to enhance productivity and ensure employee safety. The company follows a thorough consulting and engineering process to develop tailored solutions that meet strict sanitary standards while utilizing the latest technology in production. Additionally, they provide installation, training, and after-sales services to ensure optimal operation of their equipment.
